message:
feat(server,runtime): implement replica sync handshake with live primary over TCP

fr-runtime:
- Add server_port() accessor and replica_sync_target() method that
  returns (host, port) when the replica is in non-connected state
- Add set_replica_connection_state() to update replication role state
- Change REPLICAOF initial state from "connected" to "connect" to
  indicate handshake is still needed
- Update test assertions to match new initial state

fr-server:
- Add full replica sync pipeline: replica_handshake_frame() builds
  RESP arrays, read_frame_from_stream() reads with timeout,
  sync_replica_with_primary() performs PING → REPLCONF listening-port
  → REPLCONF capa psync2 → PSYNC ? -1 → FULLRESYNC/RDB handshake
- Wire maybe_run_replica_sync() into main event loop tick
- Add integration test that spins up a real TCP primary thread,
  sets a key, encodes RDB snapshot, and verifies the replica applies
  it correctly via GET after sync

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
